KHAS Level Placement and Proficiency Exams

The KHAS English Level Placement and Proficiency Exam will be held at the Cibali Campus on September 8-10, 2025. All students who enrolled at our university this year or who enrolled last year and suspended their enrollment must take the Placement Test on September 8. This test is a prerequisite for taking the Proficiency Test, and no make-up exam will be offered.

Starting the Preparatory Program at the correct level is crucial for your success throughout the program. Students who do not take the Placement Test will be placed at the lowest level. In this case, it will take longer to complete the program, and you will most likely need to continue to the Summer School.
